case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SERGO BRILLAGI AND ITS SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SERGO BRILLAGI AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
